headline: Analysts Trims PepsiCo (PEP) Price Target by $10. Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.12%, PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) is included among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now. PepsiCo, Inc. headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Gets Mixed Wall Street Reviews as Growth Challenges Persist
summary: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) is included among the 10 Best S&P 500 Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 12, TD Cowen lowered its price recommendation on PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) to $150 from $165. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares. The firm reduced its forecast for second-quarter organic growth to below consensus expectations, […]
